name: codex-claude-usage-meter
description: Codex workflow for installing and maintaining the Claude Usage Meter statusline.

interface.shortDescription: Install a Claude Code usage forecast statusline.
interface.longDescription: Claude Usage Meter helps Codex install and maintain a Claude Code statusline that shows 5-hour and 7-day usage percentages, reset times, and projected cap times based on recent local samples.
defaultPrompt: Install Claude Usage Meter for Claude Code
Check my Claude Usage Meter plugin setup
